languages.text: "Я не готов. Простите, {name}. Мне нужно еще время — пара лет исследований, может больше. На кону жизнь Нунциуса, я не могу решать его судьбу с неполными данными. Когда вы сказали, что поможете мне добраться до Амсанкта, меня охватил ужас. Что если я ошибусь? У меня не будет другого шанса. Я запаниковал и назвал систему, где часто проходят торговые суда, чтобы добраться до {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфола{/g} и присоединиться к Эксплораторам в надежде выиграть время и отыскать новые знания. Я... действовал нерационально".

traits.locale_text: "Я не готов. Простите, {name}. Мне нужно еще время — пара лет исследований, может больше. На кону жизнь Нунциуса, я не могу решать его судьбу с неполными данными. Когда вы сказали, что поможете мне добраться до Амсанкта, меня охватил ужас. Что если я ошибусь? У меня не будет другого шанса. Я запаниковал и назвал систему, где часто проходят торговые суда, чтобы добраться до {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфола{/g} и присоединиться к Эксплораторам в надежде выиграть время и отыскать новые знания. Я... действовал нерационально".

languages.text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

languages.text: «No estoy listo. Lo siento, {name}. Necesito más tiempo. Necesito años para investigar, o tal vez más. La vida de Nuncius está en juego, y no puedo pronunciarme sin tener todos los datos. Cuando me dijo que me ayudaría a llegar a Amsanct, me sentí aterrado. Presa del pánico, mencioné un sistema por el que a menudo pasan naves comerciales, para poder llegar a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g} y, desde allí, unirme a los exploradores con la esperanza de ganar tiempo y descubrir algo nuevo. Me comporté de forma... irracional».
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

traits.locale_text: «No estoy listo. Lo siento, {name}. Necesito más tiempo. Necesito años para investigar, o tal vez más. La vida de Nuncius está en juego, y no puedo pronunciarme sin tener todos los datos. Cuando me dijo que me ayudaría a llegar a Amsanct, me sentí aterrado. Presa del pánico, mencioné un sistema por el que a menudo pasan naves comerciales, para poder llegar a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g} y, desde allí, unirme a los exploradores con la esperanza de ganar tiempo y descubrir algo nuevo. Me comporté de forma... irracional».

languages.text: “我还没准备好。抱歉，{name}。我需要更多时间——让我再研究上几年，或者更久些。事关努恩修斯的生死，我不能在数据不完整的情况下决定他的命运。当您说要帮我去阿姆桑克特时，我吓坏了。万一我错了怎么办？我不会再有机会了。我慌了，就随口说了个商船经常经过的星系，想着能借道去{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}，再加入开拓者，以此来拖延时间，寻找新知识。我……表现得不理性了。”
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

traits.locale_text: “我还没准备好。抱歉，{name}。我需要更多时间——让我再研究上几年，或者更久些。事关努恩修斯的生死，我不能在数据不完整的情况下决定他的命运。当您说要帮我去阿姆桑克特时，我吓坏了。万一我错了怎么办？我不会再有机会了。我慌了，就随口说了个商船经常经过的星系，想着能借道去{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}，再加入开拓者，以此来拖延时间，寻找新知识。我……表现得不理性了。”

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas prêt. Je regrette, {name}, mais il me faut plus de temps. Quelques années pour mener toutes les recherches nécessaires, peut-être plus. C'est la vie de Nuncius qui est en jeu, je ne peux pas m'appuyer sur des données incomplètes pour décider de son sort. Lorsque vous avez dit que vous m'aideriez à aller sur {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Amsanct{/g}, cela m'a terrifié. Et si je me trompais ? Je n'aurai pas droit à une seconde chance. Alors, j'ai paniqué et mentionné un système fréquenté par des vaisseaux de commerce, afin de pouvoir me rendre à Castel. De là, je comptais rejoindre les Explorators dans l'espoir de gagner du temps et d'acquérir de nouvelles connaissances. J'ai agi de manière... irrationnelle. »
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

languages.text: "Hazır değilim. Özür dilerim {name}. Daha fazla zamana ihtiyacım var. Araştırmak için birkaç yıla, belki daha fazlasına. Nuncius'un hayatı tehlikede, onun kaderine eksik verilerle karar veremem. Amsanct'a ulaşmama yardım edeceğinizi söylediğinizde bu beni dehşete düşürdü. Ya yanılıyorsam? Bir şansım daha olmayacak. Paniğe kapıldım ve ticaret gemilerinin sık sık geçtiği bir sistemin adını verdim, böylece {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'a{/g} gidebilir ve oradan da zaman kazanmak ve yeni bilgiler keşfetmek umuduyla Keşiftörlere katılabilirdim. Ben... Mantıksız davrandım."
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

Ben... Mantıksız davrandım."

languages.text: "Ich bin nicht bereit. Tut mir leid, {name}. Ich brauche mehr Zeit ... einige Jahre Forschung, vielleicht auch mehr. Nuncius' Leben steht auf dem Spiel. Ich kann sein Schicksal nicht mit unvollständigen Daten besiegeln. Euer Vorschlag, mir zu helfen, nach Amsanct zu gelangen, hat mir Angst gemacht. Was, wenn ich mich irre? Eine zweite Chance bekomme ich nicht. Ich geriet in Panik und habe ein System genannt, das Handelsschiffe häufig passieren, um nach {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} zu kommen und mich dort den Exploratoren anzuschließen, um Zeit zu gewinnen und neues Wissen zu entdecken. Das war ... irrational."
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. When you said you would help me reach Amsanct, it terrified me. What if I'm wrong? I won't get another chance. I panicked and named a system where trading vessels often pass through, so I can get to {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} and from there join the Explorators in the hope of buying time and discovering new knowledge. I... acted irrationally."

Das war ... irrational."

languages.text: 「まだ準備ができていないごめんなさい、{name} 。調査には数年、いやもっと時間が必要だ。ヌンキウスの命がかかっている。不完全なデータで彼の運命を決めることはできない。あなたがアムサンクトに行くのを手伝ってくれると言ったとき、私は怖くなりました。もし間違っていたら？もうチャンスはない。私はパニックに陥り、貿易船がよく通過する星系を指定した。フットフォールまで行き、そこからエクスプロレイターズと合流することで、時間を稼ぎ、新たな知識を発見することを期待したのだ。私は...不合理な行動をとった。」
languages.original_text: "I'm not ready. I'm sorry, {name}. I need more time — a few years to research, perhaps more. Nuncius's life is at stake, I cannot decide his fate with incomplete data. I... acted irrationally."
